Appendix I: Appendix II:Only the populations of Eswatini, Namibia and South Africa; all other populations are included in Appendix I. Populations of Eswatini and South Africa: for the exclusive purpose of allowing international trade in live animals to appropriate and acceptable destinations and hunting trophies. Population of Namibia: for the exclusive purpose of allowing international trade in live animals for in-situ conservation only, and only within the natural and historical range of Ceratotherium simum in Africa. All other specimens shall be deemed to be specimens of species included in Appendix I and the trade in them shall be regulated accordingly.
